title: Default 8×8(＆Item)
description: This resource pack changes the appearance of default blocks and items to half their original size (8×8).
body:
![ITEMversion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4abd86c170af7bcbc2f5eafd1e5c00955e85bcf.webp)
# Default 8×8
This resource pack is a simple pack that changes the appearance of blocks and items to half their default size.
